event: The River Thames with St. Paul's Cathedral on Lord Mayor's Day
description: A wide panoramic view of the River Thames in London, teeming with boats of every size on the occasion of the Lord Mayor's Day procession. The great dome of St. Paul's Cathedral dominates the left portion of the skyline, its pale stone rising above surrounding rooftops, steeples, and spires. Dozens of church towers punctuate the city horizon stretching to the right. The river is crowded with barges, rowing boats, sailing vessels, and small craft, many carrying passengers in ceremonial procession. The water reflects the hazy sky in muted blues and warm grays.

_meta.title: The River Thames with St. Paul's Cathedral on Lord Mayor's Day
